scripts.vendor:pixi: PIXI_VER=$(node -p "require('fs').readFileSync('assets/vendor/pixi.min.mjs','utf8').match(/PixiJS - v([0-9.]+)/)[1]") && echo "refreshing pixi $PIXI_VER" && cd /tmp && rm -rf pixi-vendor && mkdir pixi-vendor && cd pixi-vendor && npm pack pixi.js@$PIXI_VER >/dev/null && tar xzf pixi.js-$PIXI_VER.tgz package/dist/pixi.min.mjs && cp package/dist/pixi.min.mjs $OLDPWD/assets/vendor/pixi.min.mjs && cd $OLDPWD && rm -rf /tmp/pixi-vendor
